whyUs.speedDesc: Guaranteed on every project. 10% refund if I miss the deadline.
whyUs.priceDesc: 30–50% below market rate during the launch event (until May 31).
whyUs.fullCycleDesc: Strategy, design, build, deploy, and handoff — one person.

process.step1Desc: 30–60 min chat or video to clarify scope, budget, and timeline
process.step2Desc: Detailed proposal with scope, deliverables, timeline, and price
process.step3Desc: Stage-by-stage updates with real-time feedback loops
process.step4Desc: Ops guide video + docs + 14-day free support

pricing.refundPolicy: 10% refund if I miss the 5-day deadline

testimonials.empty: Reviews coming in May. Be the first client!

faq.a1: Simple landing pages take 1–2 days, standard sites 3–5 days. Rush in 1 day available (+30–50%). 10% refund if I miss the deadline.
faq.q2: Does fast delivery mean lower quality?
faq.a2: A live 8-country automation system and 10 websites + 2 apps shipped in 4 months speak for themselves. Speed and quality aren't a trade-off.
faq.a3: Based on scope, design level, timeline, and ops support. Free consultation first, then a transparent proposal. No hidden fees.
faq.q4: Is the English version the same price?
faq.a4: Base price is for Korean. Extra languages are +₩20,000 per language.
faq.a5: 14-day free revisions after handoff. 10% refund if I miss the 5-day deadline. Unlimited revisions within contract scope.
faq.a6: Same price. Platform secure payment and review system available. Direct email/KakaoTalk is also welcome.

contact.responsePromise: Temp reply in 1h · Full quote in 24h
contact.success: Inquiry received! I'll get back to you shortly.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please email directly.

about.title: About
about.name: Jaehong Jung
about.bio: A full-stack builder focused on speed and fair pricing. In 4 months, I shipped 10 websites and 2 mobile apps. A live content automation system (8 countries, 18 accounts, 55 schedules) is proof of execution.

footer.tagline: Ship in 5 days max · Fair pricing, speed first
